meaning: adj.未成熟的,太早的,早熟的
examples: The baby was four weeks premature.
Premature babies have to be fed intravenously.
Premature birth is the main cause of perinatal mortality.
But charities described the move as "premature" and warned it would be the poorest who suffered.
Those requirements have not been met, so it is premature to send the report to Congress.
